name: ComputeYieldCalculation
businessLogic: Retrieve InternalDataModel and RequestContext from SlotsDTO.
Obtain current BOD date from ConfigService and compute next year date and toDate (nextYearDate minus 1 day).

If featureType is 'ApyeCreate': retrieve ApyeDTO, interestEarned, and avgBalance from SlotsDTO; if avgBalance is zero set APYE to zero, otherwise populate ApyeDTO and invoke yield calculation engine for APYE; wrap result in ApiSingleResponse and set on InternalDataModel.

If featureType is 'ApyCreate': set FROM_DATE and TO_DATE on SlotsDTO; retrieve ApyDTO, intAmt, principal, fromDate, toDate from SlotsDTO; calculate base days (366 for leap year, 365 otherwise); if principal is zero set APY to zero, otherwise populate ApyDTO and invoke yield calculation engine for APY; wrap result in ApiSingleResponse and set on InternalDataModel.
Yield calculation is performed by serialising the request via inope.executeTransformation, calling irr_calculator.inope.calculate, then deserialising the engine output back to the response DTO.
Set updated InternalDataModel back onto SlotsDTO.
